lines.gurmukhi: ਪਸਰੀ ਕਿਰਣਿ ਰਸਿ ਕਮਲ ਬਿਗਾਸੇ ਸਸਿ ਘਰਿ ਸੂਰੁ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: pasaree kiran ras kamal bigaase sas ghar soor samaaeaa |
lines.english: The rays of light spread out, and the heart-lotus joyfully blossoms forth; the sun enters into the house of the moon.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤਿ ਰਸਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਚਲੂਲੈ ਰਾਤੀ ਦੂਜਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: at ras rang chaloolai raatee doojaa rang na koee |
lines.english: I am dyed in the deep crimson color of His Love. I am not colored by any other color.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਬਿਧੁੰਸਿ ਮਨਸਾ ਮਨਿ ਮਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kaal bidhuns manasaa man maaree gur prasaad prabh paaeaa |3|
lines.english: I have conquered death; the desires of the mind are destroyed. By Guru's Grace, I have found God. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਸਨਿ ਰਸਾਏ ਰਾਤੇ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਈ ॥੪॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak rasan rasaae raate rav rahiaa prabh soee |4|15|
lines.english: O Nanak, my tongue is saturated with the taste of God, who is permeating and pervading everywhere. ||4||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਰਹ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਵਲ ਖਪਿ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਚਹੁ ਛਿਅ ਮਹਿ ਸੰਨਿਆਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: baarah meh raaval khap jaaveh chahu chhia meh saniaasee |
lines.english: The Yogis are divided into twelve schools, the Sannyaasees into ten.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗੀ ਕਾਪੜੀਆ ਸਿਰਖੂਥੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਗਲਿ ਫਾਸੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jogee kaaparreea sirakhoothe bin sabadai gal faasee |1|
lines.english: The Yogis and those wearing religious robes, and the Jains with their all hair plucked out - without the Word of the Shabad, the noose is around their necks. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: sabad rate poore bairaagee |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Shabad are the perfectly detached renunciates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਹਠਿ ਹਸਤ ਮਹਿ ਭੀਖਿਆ ਜਾਚੀ ਏਕ ਭਾਇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aauhatth hasat meh bheekhiaa jaachee ek bhaae liv laagee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They beg to receive charity in the hands of their hearts, embracing love and affection for the One. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝੇ ਕਿਛੁ ਸੂਝੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin boojhe kichh soojhai naahee manamukh vichhurr dukh paae |2|
lines.english: Without true understanding, those self-willed manmukhs understand nothing. Separated from God, they suffer in pain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਣ ਵਾਦੁ ਪੜਹਿ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਿਆ ਕਰਣੀ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: brahaman vaad parreh kar kiriaa karanee karam karaae |
lines.english: The Brahmins study and argue about the scriptures; they perform ceremonial rituals, and lead others in these rituals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੇ ਸੂਚਾਚਾਰੀ ਸਾਚੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਾਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad mile se soochaachaaree saachee daragah maane |
lines.english: Those who receive the Shabad are sanctified and pure; they are approved in the True Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੇ ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਸੁਚਿ ਸੰਜਮ ਜਪ ਤਪ ਤੀਰਥ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: sagale karam dharam such sanjam jap tap teerath sabad vase |
lines.english: Good deeds, righteousness and Dharmic faith, purification, austere self-discipline, chanting, intense meditation and pilgrimages to sacred shrines - all these abide in the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤਨਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੇ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਨੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: anadin naam ratan liv laage jug jug saach samaane |3|
lines.english: Night and day, they remain lovingly attuned to the Naam; throughout the ages, they are merged in the True One. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਦੂਖ ਪਰਾਛਤ ਕਾਲ ਨਸੇ ॥੪॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur milai milaaeaa dookh paraachhat kaal nase |4|16|
lines.english: O Nanak, united in union with the True Guru, suffering, sin and death run away. ||4||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਾ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁ ਸਾਧ ਜਨ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਤਰੁ ਤਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: santaa kee ren saadh jan sangat har keerat tar taaree |
lines.english: The dust of the feet of the Saints, the Company of the Holy, and the Praises of the Lord carry us across to the other side.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਾ ਕਰੈ ਬਪੁਰਾ ਜਮੁ ਡਰਪੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਮੁਰਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kahaa karai bapuraa jam ddarapai guramukh ridai muraaree |1|
lines.english: What can the wretched, terrified Messenger of Death do to the Gurmukhs? The Lord abides in their hearts. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਜਾਉ ਜੀਵਨੁ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jal jaau jeevan naam binaa |
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, life might just as well be burnt down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਜਾਪੁ ਜਪਉ ਜਪਮਾਲੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਵੈ ਸਾਦੁ ਮਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jap jaap jpau japamaalee guramukh aavai saad manaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Gurmukh chants and meditates on the Lord, chanting the chant on the mala; the Flavor of the Lord comes into the mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲ ਜਵੇਹਰ ਰਤਨ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਖੋਜਤ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲਹੀਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: laal javehar ratan padaarath khojat guramukh laheeai |2|
lines.english: The Gurmukh seeks and finds the gems and jewels, diamonds, rubies and treasures. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਉਪਦੇਸ ਸਾਚੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਕਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਉਪਮਾ ਕਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: gur upades saach sukh jaa kau kiaa tis upamaa kaheeai |
lines.english: Those who follow the Guru's Teachings find true peace - how can I even describe the glory of such a person?

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੀਨੈ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਸਾਚੌ ਏਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: cheenai giaan dhiaan dhan saachau ek sabad liv laavai |
lines.english: So center yourself on the treasures of spiritual wisdom and meditation; remain lovingly attuned to the One True Lord, and the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਇਰ ਸਪਤ ਭਰੇ ਜਲ ਨਿਰਮਲਿ ਉਲਟੀ ਨਾਵ ਤਰਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saaeir sapat bhare jal niramal ulattee naav taraavai |
lines.english: The seven seas are overflowing with the Immaculate Water; the inverted boat floats across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਾਲੰਬੁ ਨਿਰਹਾਰੁ ਨਿਹਕੇਵਲੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: niraalanb nirahaar nihakeval nirbhau taarree laavai |3|
lines.english: Remain absorbed in the Primal State of the Fearless, Immaculate, Independent, Self-sufficient Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਗਿਰਹੀ ਸੋ ਦਾਸੁ ਉਦਾਸੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: so girahee so daas udaasee jin guramukh aap pachhaaniaa |
lines.english: He is a householder, he is a renunciate and God's slave, who, as Gurmukh, realizes his own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰਿ ਜਾਤੌ ਠਾਕਿ ਰਹਾਵੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: baahar jaatau tthaak rahaavai guramukh sehaj samaavai |4|
lines.english: The mind which wandered in external distractions is restrained and held in check; the Gurmukh is intuitively absorbed in God. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਕਹੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਦੂਜਾ ਸਾਚ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥੫॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: naanak kahai avar nahee doojaa saach sabad man maaniaa |5|17|
lines.english: Says Nanak, his mind is pleased and appeased by the True Word of the Shabad; there is no other at all. ||5||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਚਉਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: raag prabhaatee mahalaa 3 chaupade |
lines.english: Raag Prabhaatee, Third Mehl, Chau-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਸਾਚਿ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam rate sadaa sukh paavai saach rahai liv laaee |1|
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the Naam, the Name of the Lord, find everlasting peace; they remain lovingly attuned to the True One. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਕੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh viralaa koee boojhai sabade rahiaa samaaee |
lines.english: Those who become Gurmukh and understand are very rare; God is permeating and pervading through the Word of His Shabad.
